examples: I could see that any moment now they'll probably sell the water-buffalo and mechanise...
The best set of mechanise is put out, named as "922111", with the present equipment for shaft construction. The mixing work style of cutting and building in short section.
We mechanise a task, get it done by machines, which frees up humans to go and do something else.
The only real way of bending that health care cost curve is to mechanise, to turn health care into a manufacture not a service.
Pedants used to insist that words like mechanise and organise be spelt -ize, since they come from Greek roots and -izo is a common Greek way of forming verbs.
